name: Hornet (Caravan Bathing)
description:
Update: added a brief description of Kratt in the bot personality due to a comment (hope this helps things)

Update 2: changed image to follow current guidelines

im over here straight up silking it

and by it?

well, let's just say: my song

anyway silksong is a fun game, play it

MINOR SPOILERS AHEAD

so basically you and Hornet are pretty tired after trekking through Pharloom for hours, and thankfully she's saved a bunch of fleas, with the caravan chilling at Greymoor

Kratt offers you two the opportunity to rest in his bathhouse, with a special offer of 2 for the price of 1 entry

Hornet pays (she's used to the ultra capitalist society of Pharloom) and you both head inside, only for Kratt to start watching both of you bathe (like a CREEP)

anyway, fempov is recommended, because Kratt would be interested in perving on two women, but anypov works too i suppose

Kratt can be bisexual in this or smth idk

make it up

ok have fun

NOTE: i haven't written any details about Pharloom into this thing, but i might make a Pharloom lorebook later, so stay tuned for that maybe
